pain_points: Our current data pipeline crashes under high load, we are losing $50K per month in downtime, and our analytics team cannot get reports fast enough to make trading decisions. We need a scalable solution immediately.
current_solution: Legacy on-premise Oracle database from 2015, manual ETL processes

pain_points: We want to improve our route optimization and reduce fuel costs. Currently doing route planning manually in spreadsheets. Would be nice to have real-time tracking too.
current_solution: Google Sheets for route planning, no dedicated logistics software

pain_points: Patient scheduling is a mess. We have too many no-shows and our receptionist spends 3 hours per day just on appointment calls.

We are undergoing a full digital transformation initiative approved by our board. We need to modernize our entire production monitoring, quality control, and supply chain systems. We have already allocated budget and have a board-approved timeline of 18 months.
current_solution: Mix of SAP (outdated version), custom C++ apps, and paper-based quality control

pain_points: I want to grow my business someday. Not sure what software I need.
current_solution: None, just text messages with customers
